dataset_name: Drug Labels and Side Effects Dataset
domain: healthcare, pharmaceutical safety, drug label and adverse effect analysis
description: A structured pharmaceutical dataset containing synthetic drug records with labeling, manufacturer, approval, dosage, administration, contraindication, warning, pricing, and side-effect fields. It is useful for retrieval over drug properties, side-effect analysis, medication label exploration, and prototyping healthcare analytics workflows. The dataset contains 1,436 rows and 15 columns describing synthetic but realistic medication profiles.
embedding_text: Dataset: Drug Labels and Side Effects Dataset. Source: Kaggle drug labels and side effects dataset. Domain: healthcare, pharmaceutical safety, medication labeling, adverse effect analysis. Rows: 1436. Columns: 15. Structure: each row represents a drug profile with fields for drug name, manufacturer, approval year, drug class, indications, side effects, dosage, administration route, contraindications, warnings, price, batch number, expiry date, side effect severity, and approval status. Content: synthetic but realistic pharmaceutical product records intended for healthcare analytics and medication safety analysis. Use cases: drug information retrieval, side-effect lookup, label-based search, educational demos, and RAG-based answers about medication attributes and adverse effects.
